陈家沟的贫穷在十里八村是出了名的，自从爷爷走后，陈斌便跟“克夫”的寡嫂相依为命，维持着爷爷留下的小医馆，维持生计。
可那一日，未婚妻拿着爷爷的信物前来退婚，让陈斌的生活雪上加霜，但陈斌却因祸得福！
爷爷的信物让他开启了新的人生，获得了传承。
从此，陈斌的日子也过得滋润了起来，看看病，种种药，搞旅游，将贫穷的陈家沟发展的征程日上，爱情事情双丰收！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f7f4e4c9499776510aa2b73bbb924795","author":"一夜爆红吧","author_id":"","book_id":"7467830023324437566","book_name":"守村女人正当年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7467830058313318974","read_count":"39650","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2520703"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"1234","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,神医,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/347af40ff44164c67e7d400c7270bdd1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388484&x-signature=OT6wZcGg6Da50aF17p1koA56N%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1920165735049011","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230234442380E6C2DC839EA8A32B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":46223,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":12697},"user_acti
